name: Fizzpop the Tinker
skills: Arcana +5, Sleight of Hand +5, Tinker's Tools +5

features.name: Nimble Escape
features.text: The goblin can take the Disengage or Hide action as a bonus action on each of its turns.

features.name: Non-Combatant
features.text: Fizzpop won't enter the Dripfort and won't engage in combat. Any attacks directed at her are deflected by one of her many defensive gadgets (DM's discretion - she's not meant to be killable by the players).

summary.description: A goblin inventor who lives alone in a maintenance closet in the Eastern Pipes, surrounded by salvaged junk and dangerous prototypes. She has singed eyebrows, bottle-bottom goggles, and a manic energy that borders on worrying. She speaks at approximately twice the speed of a normal goblin and rarely finishes a sentence before starting a new one. She built the Scumskimmer, a barrel-boat coated in rendered troll fat that can ferry goblins across the sludge moat. She will not enter the Dripfort or engage in combat.

encounters.description: Found in her workshop behind a rusty metal door covered in scratched warnings at the dead end of a narrow service tunnel in the Eastern Pipes. If recruited, she hauls the Scumskimmer to the moat's edge.

groups.treasure: None (she wants the grappling hook, 25 ft. of silk rope, and the acid vial as payment)
